---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new example, gameplay mechanic, or repo improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the idea briefly.

## Problem To Solve

What limitation, teaching need, or developer pain point does this address?

## Proposed Direction

How do you imagine the change working?

## Scope

- New example
- Improvement to an existing example
- Documentation
- Maintainer workflow

## Extra Context

Add links, sketches, or classroom use cases if available.
